# Auto-generated walkthrough guide

# It has a button.
> examine dispenser
# A Babel fish shoots out of the dispenser. It arcs downward. It falls into a
#   drain.
> push button
# You are carrying: a gown a towel a satchel a loose pile of mail
> inventory
# You put the towel on the drain.
> cover drain with towel
# A Babel fish shoots out of the dispenser. It arcs downward. The Babel fish
#   lands on the towel.
> push button
# Store the satchel in the front of panel
# You put the satchel on the panel.
> put satchel in front of panel
# A Babel fish shoots out of the dispenser. It arcs downward. The Babel fish
#   lands on the towel.
> push button
# You put the gown on the metal hook.
> hang gown on hook
# A Babel fish shoots out of the dispenser. It arcs downward. The Babel fish
#   lands on the towel.
> push button
# You put the loose pile of mail on the large fan.
> put mail on fan
# GAME WON
# A Babel fish shoots out of the dispenser. It arcs downward. The Babel fish
#   lands on the towel.
> push button
